risks: No managed identity configured — Service Bus and Cosmos DB accessed via connection strings in Container App secrets, contradicting the plan's own 'secure defaults with managed identity' principle
No Key Vault resource for secret management — secrets are stored directly in Container App configuration
Public network access enabled on both Event Grid topic and Cosmos DB account — no network isolation
No zone redundancy — Container Apps Environment (zoneRedundant: false) and Cosmos DB (isZoneRedundant: false) are single-zone, single-region with no automatic failover

Dapr component secretRef 'servicebus-connection-string' references a secret that is not defined at the component level — in Azure Container Apps, Dapr component secrets must be declared on the component resource itself
No Container Registry resource included — Container App image placeholder '<your-registry>/event-processor:latest' has no corresponding ACR resource or AcrPull role assignment
No VNet integration for any resource — all services communicate over public endpoints
correctionsRecommended: Add a User-Assigned Managed Identity resource and attach it to the Container App; use RBAC role assignments (e.g., Azure Service Bus Data Receiver, Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor) instead of connection strings
Add an Azure Key Vault resource and reference secrets from Key Vault rather than storing them inline in Container App configuration
Add an Azure Container Registry resource with an AcrPull role assignment for the managed identity so the Container App can pull the event-processor image
Define secrets on the Dapr component resource itself or use managed identity-based metadata for the Service Bus Dapr component
Consider disabling public network access on Cosmos DB and Event Grid; add VNet integration with private endpoints for production workloads
Enable zone redundancy on Container Apps Environment and enable automatic failover on Cosmos DB for production resilience
Add CORS policy configuration on the Container App ingress as required by Azure deployment best practices
Connect the Container Apps Environment to Log Analytics using explicit logAnalyticsConfiguration with customerId and sharedKey properties
